conflict: Marisol's revenge impulse produces flat accusation; honest complexity requires implicating herself.
consequence: She commits to a documentary-poetic draft that includes her relapse and refuses to cast any single person as pure martyr or villain.
must_land_beats: Writing process foregrounds revision choices rather than inspiration myth.
Luis challenges Marisol to distinguish exposure from amends.
Salvador's nurse warns his lucid windows are closing.
Marisol requests one last interview with focused questions.
objective: Draft a catalogue essay before Salvador dies and the record hardens without her.
